generated_by: Agent 2 - SAS VA → Power BI Migration

report.name: Retail Insights
report.description: Retail operations dashboard covering store banner performance, geographic sales analysis, and promotional effectiveness.
report.purpose: Enable retail executives and marketing managers to compare store banner performance, evaluate geographic ROI with what-if scenarios, and assess promotional effectiveness against forecast and baseline revenue.

sources.name: rand_retaildemo
sources.label: RAND_RETAILDEMO
sources.description: Retail demo transaction data with store, product, customer, and geographic information.

sources.name: promo_effectiveness
sources.label: PROMO_EFFECTIVENESS_X_EFFECTS_2
sources.description: Promotion effectiveness data with actual, baseline, and expected revenue along with price impact metrics.

measures.name: store_age
measures.label: Store Age
measures.description: Age of the store in years

measures.name: adjusted_sales
measures.label: Adjusted Sales
measures.description: Row-level adjusted sales: for regions US_MW, US_CS, US_AT, LATA, EU, ASIA multiply Sales by (0.85 + sales_change_parameter); for all other regions multiply Sales by (1 + sales_change_parameter). Aggregated as sum.

measures.name: adjusted_sales_cost
measures.label: Adjusted Sales Cost
measures.description: Row-level adjusted cost: Cost multiplied by (1 + cost_change_parameter). Aggregated as sum.

measures.name: revenue_expected_change
measures.label: Revenue Expected Change
measures.description: Expected change in revenue due to promotion

measures.name: halo_cannibal_impact
measures.label: Halo / Cannibal Impact
measures.description: Halo and cannibalization impact on revenue

measures.name: own_price_impact
measures.label: Own Price Impact
measures.description: Impact of own-price changes on revenue

metrics.name: total_sales
metrics.label: Total Sales
metrics.description: Sum of all sales transactions

metrics.name: total_cost
metrics.label: Total Cost
metrics.description: Sum of all transaction costs

metrics.name: total_marketing_budget
metrics.label: Total Marketing Budget
metrics.description: Sum of marketing budget

metrics.name: avg_marketing_budget
metrics.label: Average Marketing Budget
metrics.description: Average marketing budget per record within grouping

metrics.name: avg_sales
metrics.label: Regular Sales Avg
metrics.description: Average sales per transaction

metrics.name: total_margin
metrics.label: Total Margin
metrics.description: Sum of profit margin

metrics.name: total_adjusted_sales
metrics.label: Total Adjusted Sales
metrics.description: Sum of adjusted sales (what-if scenario driven by sales_change parameter)

metrics.name: total_adjusted_sales_cost
metrics.label: Total Adjusted Sales Cost
metrics.description: Sum of adjusted cost (what-if scenario driven by cost_change parameter)

metrics.name: avg_store_square_footage
metrics.label: Average Store Square Footage
metrics.description: Average store square footage within grouping

metrics.name: marketing_pct_of_sales
metrics.label: Marketing Pct of Sales
metrics.description: Average marketing budget divided by total sales. Shows what percentage of sales revenue is allocated to marketing.

metrics.name: sales_per_sqft
metrics.label: Sales per SQFT
metrics.description: Total sales divided by average store square footage. Measures sales productivity per unit of floor space.

metrics.name: roi
metrics.label: ROI
metrics.description: Return on investment: (Total Sales - Total Cost) / Total Cost

metrics.name: adjusted_sales_metric
metrics.label: Adjusted Sales
metrics.description: What-if adjusted sales. For regions US_MW, US_CS, US_AT, LATA, EU, ASIA: Sales * (0.85 + sales_change). For other regions: Sales * (1 + sales_change). Row-level calculation aggregated as sum.

type_params.expr: IF region_2 IN ('US_MW','US_CS','US_AT','LATA','EU','ASIA') THEN sum(sales) * (0.85 + sales_change) ELSE sum(sales) * (1 + sales_change)

metrics.name: adjusted_cost_metric
metrics.label: Adjusted Sales Cost
metrics.description: What-if adjusted cost: Cost * (1 + cost_change). Row-level calculation aggregated as sum.

metrics.name: adjust_roi
metrics.label: Adjust ROI
metrics.description: Adjusted ROI using what-if parameters: (Total Adjusted Sales - Total Adjusted Sales Cost) / Total Adjusted Sales Cost

metrics.name: total_revenue_actual
metrics.label: Total Revenue Actual
metrics.description: Sum of actual promotional revenue

metrics.name: total_revenue_baseline
metrics.label: Total Revenue Baseline
metrics.description: Sum of baseline revenue (no promotion)

metrics.name: total_revenue_expected
metrics.label: Total Revenue Expected
metrics.description: Sum of forecasted/expected promotional revenue

metrics.name: actual_vs_forecast
metrics.label: Actual vs Forecast
metrics.description: Percentage difference between actual and forecasted revenue: (Actual - Expected) / Expected. Positive means actual exceeded forecast.

metrics.name: actual_vs_baseline
metrics.label: Actual vs Baseline
metrics.description: Incremental lift of promotion: (Actual - Baseline) / Baseline. Measures incremental revenue over no-promotion baseline.

metrics.name: forecast_vs_baseline
metrics.label: Forecast vs Baseline
metrics.description: Projected incremental impact: (Expected - Baseline) / Baseline. Measures forecasted revenue lift over baseline.

metrics.name: total_revenue_expected_change
metrics.label: Total Revenue Expected Change
metrics.description: Sum of expected revenue change from promotions

metrics.name: total_halo_cannibal_impact
metrics.label: Total Halo / Cannibal Impact
metrics.description: Sum of halo and cannibalization revenue impact

metrics.name: total_own_price_impact
metrics.label: Total Own Price Impact
metrics.description: Sum of own-price impact on revenue

metrics.name: total_total_price_impact
metrics.label: Total Price Impact
metrics.description: Sum of total price impact on revenue

metrics.name: avg_forecast_accuracy
metrics.label: Average Forecast Accuracy
metrics.description: Average forecast accuracy across promotions

metrics.name: avg_age
metrics.label: Average Customer Age
metrics.description: Average customer age

metrics.name: avg_store_age
metrics.label: Average Store Age
metrics.description: Average age of stores

parameters.name: sales_change
parameters.label: Sales Change
parameters.description: What-if slider controlling the sales adjustment factor. Positive values increase adjusted sales; negative values decrease them. For six specific regions the base multiplier starts at 0.85; for others it starts at 1.0.

parameters.name: cost_change
parameters.label: Cost Change
parameters.description: What-if slider controlling the cost adjustment factor. Applied as a multiplier: Cost * (1 + cost_change).

filters.label: Iamz Dog Food Products
values: Iamz Dog Hlth Natl Bag 1X15.5 LB
Iamz Dog Lamb and Rice 1X17.4 LB
Iamz Dog Weight Cntrl Lrg Breed 1X17.4 L
Iamz Healthy Nat Weight Control 4X7 LB

pages.description: Compares three store banners (FAST, GRAND, MODA) on Marketing % of Sales, Sales by department, and Marketing Budget. Helps identify which banners are converting marketing spend into sales most efficiently.

visuals.description: KPI card showing what percentage of FAST banner sales revenue is allocated to marketing.
KPI card showing what percentage of GRAND banner sales revenue is allocated to marketing.
KPI card showing what percentage of MODA banner sales revenue is allocated to marketing.
Combo chart comparing Sales (bars) and Marketing Budget (line) across top 5 departments for the FAST store banner. Shows whether marketing investment correlates with sales by department.
Combo chart comparing Sales (bars) and Marketing Budget (line) across top 5 departments for the GRAND store banner.
Combo chart comparing Sales (bars) and Marketing Budget (line) across top 5 departments for the MODA store banner. Highlights MODA's disproportionate marketing spend vs. sales.
Descriptive text guiding users: View high-level metrics based on each banner's performance with respect to each other and across departments.

pages.description: Analyzes sales and ROI by region and state. Includes what-if sliders for sales and cost adjustments to evaluate regions for new store openings or improvements.

visuals.description: Geographic map showing Adjusted ROI by US state. Color encodes the ROI value to quickly identify high- and low-performing states.
Bar chart comparing regular Sales and Adjusted Sales by region. Allows users to see the impact of the what-if sales adjustment across regions.
KPI gauge showing an overall adjusted performance metric (Adjusted ROI or Sales per SQFT).
Slider prompt controlling the sales_change what-if parameter. Dragging adjusts the Adjusted Sales and Adjusted ROI calculations in real time.
Descriptive text: Identify the performance of various regions and states. Use this analysis to make decisions on new store locations and improvements.

pages.description: Evaluates promotional performance by comparing actual revenue to forecast and baseline revenue. Helps marketers understand incremental lift and forecast accuracy for specific product promotions.

visuals.description: Tree map showing product-level promotional lift (Actual vs Baseline). Size and color encode the magnitude of lift for 12 specific Iamz dog food products.
Crosstab showing detailed promotion metrics (revenue actual, baseline, expected, price impacts) broken down by Product Size, Product Age, and Product Health custom groups.
Descriptive text: Assess the success of promotions by comparing actual revenue to forecast and baseline revenue.

pages.description: Hidden help page explaining how to interpret the Store Banner Dashboard. Accessed via 'More information' link.

visuals.description: Detailed explanation of the Store Banner Dashboard: comparing FAST, GRAND, MODA banners; interpreting KPI tiles and bar-line charts; drill-down instructions.

pages.description: Hidden help page explaining how to use the Geographic Effectiveness page, including slider interactions and geo map tooltips.

visuals.description: Detailed explanation of the Geographic Effectiveness page: bar chart interactions, slider adjustments, and geo map hover tooltips.

pages.description: Hidden help page explaining how to use the Promotion Effectiveness page, including product selection and promotional sales lift interpretation.

visuals.description: Detailed explanation of the Promotion Effectiveness page: tree map interactions, crosstab filtering, and KPI interpretation.
